meaning: n.嘎声,喋喋不休者,绝顶典型
examples: Yes, that's a rattler, I won't go near it. 'Finished!
'Yes, that's a rattler, I won't go near it.' Finished!
But the Court in MGM v. Grokster knows it has a rattler, not a garden snake, in its hands.
Of the 22 species within the Morganza Spillway, three -- the copperhead, cottonmouth and canebrake rattler -- are venomous.
Of the 22 species of snakes within the Morganza Spillway, three -- the copperhead, cottonmouth and canebrake rattler -- are venomous.
